turns.content: Loy Krathong is coming na ka!! November 5 this year. I want to do something special at my cart for the festival — any ideas?? 🏮

Loy Krathong is such a beautiful festival — great idea to do something special! Since you're a khao man gai vendor, are you thinking a limited-time menu addition, a festive combo deal, or something else? What's your gut feeling?

I was thinking a special combo set na ka!! during festival SO MANY people walk around near the canals and river, everyone is hungry but want something fast. my area always get more foot traffic during Loy Krathong. I want something people can grab and walk and eat

A grab-and-walk set is perfect for festival crowds. How about a mini version of your khao man gai in a nice takeaway box? Smaller portion, lower price point — it becomes an impulse buy for people walking by. You could even pair it with a special limited-edition sauce to make it feel festive and exclusive.

ooh yes!! what if I make a special lemongrass chili sauce na ka?? only for Loy Krathong night. lemongrass smell so good and it feel very Thai festive. and I use those kraft paper boxes with the little window on top — I see on Shopee for like 5 baht each. look premium but cheap!!

Lemongrass chili sauce is an excellent choice — fragrant, distinctly Thai, and different enough from your regular sauces to feel truly special. The kraft boxes with the window are perfect too — people see the food, it looks good, they grab it. What would you charge for the mini set?

I think 40 baht na ka. half rice, 2 pieces chicken, special sauce. 40 baht is impulse buy price for festival. and if I sell 300 boxes that is 12,000 baht in ONE NIGHT on top of my regular lunch sales!! I already getting excited haha 😆

300 boxes at 40 baht is a solid target! A few prep tips to make it happen:

- Order kraft boxes from Shopee NOW — don't wait until last minute
- Pre-cook extra rice and chicken that morning since you'll need way more than normal
- Make the lemongrass sauce the day before so you're not scrambling
- Print a small "Loy Krathong Special 40 baht" sign to catch the walking crowd

And definitely film a reel about it for Instagram — behind-the-scenes of making the special sauce would be great content.

YES the reel!! I make a reel showing the sauce and the cute box, build the hype. 'one night only, Pan's Krathong Box' na ka. my followers love limited edition stuff. okay I am writing down the plan — order boxes, test sauce recipe, make content. thank you!! 🙏🏮

You've got about two months to plan which is plenty of time. Test the lemongrass sauce recipe once or twice to get it perfect, and start teasing it on Instagram maybe a week before. "One night only" creates that FOMO energy. This is going to be great — happy planning! 🙏
oh wait one more thing na ka — you think 300 boxes is realistic?? I never sell that many in one night before. maybe I should prepare 200 first and see?? I don't want to waste chicken if nobody buy 😅

Starting with 200 is actually the smarter play — less risk if it's your first festival special. If you sell out early, that's even better because it creates buzz: "Pan's boxes sold out in 2 hours!" That kind of scarcity makes people show up earlier next time. You can always scale up for the next festival.

ahhh true!! selling out is better than leftover na ka. '200 boxes, gone in 2 hours' — that is good marketing haha 😂 okay 200 it is. I go start planning the sauce recipe this weekend. so excited!! thank you na ka 🙏🏮
That's the spirit! Selling out fast is the best kind of problem to have. Enjoy the sauce experiments this weekend — taste-testing is the fun part of the job. Happy Loy Krathong planning! 🏮🙏

taste testing is the BEST part haha 😂 I make my helper try 5 different version until we find the perfect one. okay I go browse Shopee for the kraft boxes now. so much to do but it's the fun kind of busy na ka!! 🙏🏮
The fun kind of busy is the best kind! Your helper is going to love being the official taste tester. Happy Shopee shopping and happy sauce testing — Loy Krathong is going to be amazing! 🏮🙏
